check.key: Network access: Allow anonymous SID/Name translation

candidate_check.description: Windows Server 2019 must not allow anonymous SID/Name translation.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the effective setting in Local Group Policy Editor.

Run "gpedit.msc".

Navigate to Local Computer Policy >> Computer Configuration >> Windows Settings >> Security Settings >> Local Policies >> Security Options.

If the value for "Network access: Allow anonymous SID/Name translation" is not set to "Disabled", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Windows Settings >> Security Settings >> Local Policies >> Security Options >> "Network access: Allow anonymous SID/Name translation" to "Disabled".
title: Windows Server 2019 must not allow anonymous SID/Name translation.
